details.IncidentDetail: "[6] A12-052 ENRT PED LOG 75 OPEN MULT VEH IN RDWY "
"[3] RP ADVS CLOSES TO 1526 DEL ROSA "
"[2] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1124-Abandoned Vehicle to 1125-Traffic Hazard by CHP"
"[1] WHI PKTK AND OLDER WHI MH NOT CONNECTED BY PARKED SIDE BY SIDE / PARTLY BLKING DIRT RD"

"[2] RP IS STUCK IN HER VEH , CANT GET OUT "
"[9] ANIMAL CONTROL ADVISING THEY WILL GENERATE THE CALL -- UNK ETA "
"[7] 1039 AFTER HOURS ANIMAL CONTROL // SPOKE TO THE RP AS WELL"

"[7] BOTH LANES BLOCKED ON THE WB SIDE "
"[5] 1039 CALFIRE -- THEYRE ALREADY 97 W/ THE PRTY"
